residualRisks: The new parchment and embedded frame treatments rely on token-driven mixes and should still be spot-checked in any external host surfaces beyond the repo stories and mock previews.
result.summary: Expanded the shared CodeBlock, CodeEditor, and DiffViewer APIs with reusable frame, density, file metadata, and asymmetric diff layout controls; updated the direct stories/tests to cover metadata-heavy, embedded, alternate-frame, empty, and one-sided states; and replaced the recurring Seraph/chat wrapper patterns with the shared surface APIs.
